units.source_text: On 8 January 2026, the proposal to privatise Hang Seng Bank Limited (‘Hang Seng Bank’) through a scheme of arrangement was approved by
units.translation_target_text: 2026 年 1 月 8 日，通过协议安排将恒生银行有限公司（‘恒生银行’）私有化的提案获得了

units.source_text: Hang Seng Bank shareholders. On approval, a financial liability was recognised in the Group’s consolidated financial statements for the present
units.translation_target_text: 恒生银行股东。经批准，在本集团合并财务报表中确认一项金融负债

units.source_text: value of the proposed HK$106bn ($13.7bn) purchase consideration. A corresponding adjustment to equity, net of derecognising the non-controlling
units.translation_target_text: 拟议收购代价为 1,060 亿港元（137 亿美元）。对权益进行相应调整，扣除终止确认非控股股东后的净额

units.source_text: interest, which stood at $7.0bn as at 31 December 2025, was also recognised. On 26 January 2026, the scheme of arrangement became effective
